title: example in the README cannot run
body:
`README.md` shows an example that is broken

symbols like `system` and `images` must be either imported individually, or qualified as `podman.system`
plus, `ApiConnection` is mispelled as `APIConnection`

comments.body: I could not say as of now, but I did take care of that in #27 at first, so if/once it is rebased and merged this particular issue should vanish
See https://pypi.org/project/podman-py/, README.md updated to use new PodmanClient()
